_notes: Source tk-soft-encounter has 2 root constraints (tk-enc-1 error, tk-enc-2 warning), extensions wardTransfer/triageCategory. Target iit-proj-encounter has 3 root constraints (iit-enc-1 error, iit-enc-2 error, iit-enc-3 warning), extensions studyVisitNumber[1..1]/protocolDeviation/visitWindow. hospitalization banned in target (max=0). serviceProvider min tightened 0->1. identifier slicing added with mandatory visitId[1..1]. type slicing added with mandatory studyVisit[1..1].

drifts.description: Constraints removed in target: [tk-enc-1, tk-enc-2]
New error constraint added in target: iit-enc-1 (Research encounters must have a visit number)
New error constraint added in target: iit-enc-2 (Encounter must reference a research patient)
New warning constraint added in target: iit-enc-3 (Completed visits should have a period with start and end)
Slicing added in target: discriminator=[{type:pattern, path:type}], rules=open
New mandatory slice 'visitId' added in target: [1..1] (mustSupport)

Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraint relaxed: source defines identifier.system as min=1 mustSupport=true on general identifier; target (iit-proj) does not define general identifier.system constraints, inheriting R4 base min=0 mustSupport=false, instead constraining within named slice visitId).

Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraint relaxed: source defines identifier.value as min=1 mustSupport=true on general identifier; target (iit-proj) does not define general identifier.value constraints, inheriting R4 base min=0 mustSupport=false, instead constraining within named slice visitId).
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type) -> none
Slicing added in target: discriminator=[{type:pattern, path:$this}], rules=open
New mandatory slice 'studyVisit' added in target: [1..1] (mustSupport)
MustSupport removed in target (element no longer constrained in target)
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-priority) -> none
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient] -> [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]
Cardinality changed: [1..*] -> [0..*]
Binding removed in target: extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-participant-type) -> none

Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner] -> [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PractitionerRole, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson]
Cardinality changed: [1..*] -> [0..*] and MustSupport removed in target
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-reason) -> none
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition] -> [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition]
MustSupport removed in target (element no longer constrained in target)
Binding removed in target: extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/diagnosis-role) -> none
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [0..0] (element banned in target)
MustSupport removed in target (element banned: max=0)
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/admit-source) -> none (element banned in target)
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/discharge-disposition) -> none (element banned in target)
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location] -> [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location]
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization] -> [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization]
Extension removed in target profile: Encounter.extension:wardTransfer (was mustSupport)
Extension removed in target profile: Encounter.extension:triageCategory (was mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Encounter.extension:studyVisitNumber [1..1] (mandatory, mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Encounter.extension:protocolDeviation (mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Encounter.extension:visitWindow (mustSupport)
